description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On September 18, 2024 at 8:44 PM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle ("Waymo AV") operating in San Francisco, California was in a 
collision involving a van on Potrero Avenue at 16th Street.  
 
The Waymo AV was stopped in a queue of traffic in the leftmost of two through lanes on southbound Potrero Avenue at the intersection 
with 16th Street when a van traveling behind the Waymo AV passed the Waymo AV on the left to enter the dedicated left turn lane. The 
passenger side of the van made contact with the rear left sensor of the Waymo AV. Without stopping, the van then crossed the double 
yellow line to the northbound side of Potrero Avenue, turned left onto eastbound 16th Street, and left the scene. At the time of the impact, 
the Waymo AV's Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode, and a test driver was present (in the driver's seating position). The 
Waymo AV sustained damage to the rear left sensor housing and assembly.
Print
Clear Form
